parameters.value: max(abs(int(JsonLevel.Get("arrows." & ArrowIndex & ".nodes.1.x")) - headX), abs(int(JsonLevel.Get("arrows." & ArrowIndex & ".nodes.1.y")) - headY)) + 1

parameters.expression:
Snake_Checkpoint.GridX = SnakeHead.GridX + SnakeHead.dirX &
Snake_Checkpoint.GridY = SnakeHead.GridY + SnakeHead.dirY
